title: distichlis multinervosa
intro: Distichlis multinervosa, also known as salt grass or desert salt grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, commonly found in coastal and inland areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is believed to have antibacterial and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Distichlis multinervosa include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as wounds, cuts, and burns, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
